---
lang: en-CA
format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    documentclass: article
    papersize: letter
    fontsize: 10pt
    geometry:
      - top=0.58in
      - bottom=0.62in
      - left=0.70in
      - right=0.70in
    include-in-header: cv-header.tex
    number-sections: false
    toc: false
    keep-tex: false
output-file: cv.pdf
---

```{=latex}
\begin{center}
  {\fontsize{22}{25}\selectfont\bfseries\color{cvnavy} Gabriel Frazer-McKee}\\[0.55em]

  \small
  \begin{tabular}{@{}l@{}}
    \cvlink{https://gafrm.github.io}{\faGlobe}{gafrm.github.io}\\[0.14em]
    \cvlink{mailto:gabriel.frazer.mckee@gmail.com}{\faEnvelope}{gabriel.frazer.mckee@gmail.com}\\[0.14em]
    \cvlink{https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0860-6192}{\faOrcid}{orcid.org/0000-0002-0860-6192}\\[0.14em]
    \cvlink{https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=MWAQth4AAAAJ}{\faGraduationCap}{scholar.google.com/citations?user=MWAQth4AAAAJ}\\[0.14em]
    \cvlink{https://github.com/gafrm}{\faGithub}{github.com/gafrm}\\[0.14em]
    \cvlink{https://www.linkedin.com/in/gabriel-frazer-mckee-401586220/}{\faLinkedinIn}{linkedin.com/in/gabriel-frazer-mckee-401586220}\\[0.14em]
    \cvlink{https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Gabriel-Frazer-Mckee}{\faResearchgate}{researchgate.net/profile/Gabriel-Frazer-Mckee}
  \end{tabular}
\end{center}
\vspace{-0.25em}
```

{{< include ../_generated/cv-orcid.md >}}

```{=latex}
\par
\vspace{0.8em}
\begin{center}
  {\scriptsize\color{cvmuted}
  Publications, funding, peer review, academic service, and employment are
  populated automatically from my
  \href{https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0860-6192}{ORCID record}.
  Education and courses taught are maintained locally.}
\end{center}
```
